---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill, command, audit dimension, or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: justice8096
---

## What Problem Does This Solve?

Describe the gap or need. Who benefits?

## Proposed Solution

What would the feature look like?

## Which Area?

- [ ] New skill (source/skills/)
- [ ] New command (source/commands/)
- [ ] Build system enhancement
- [ ] New output format
- [ ] Audit criteria improvement
- [ ] Accessibility standard coverage
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other

## Examples or References

Links to research, standards, or existing tools that inform this request.

## Would You Contribute This?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] I can help test
- [ ] Just suggesting
